raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, CA XXXX : XXXX : XXXX Date : XX/XX/year> Citi XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX, SD XXXX Subject : Dispute of Inaccurate Credit Reporting and Unauthorized Charges To Whom It May Concern, I am writing to formally dispute inaccurate and damaging information reported on my credit file/account concerning unauthorized charges made by XXXX XXXX  on my Citi credit card accounts. 
Specifically, my Citi card account ending in XXXX was reported as over the limit, showing a balance of approximately {$12000.00}, despite my actual credit limit being {$6000.00}. This inaccurate reporting has resulted in a significant and unjustified drop in my credit scorefrom XXXX to XXXX. 
Over the course of this dispute, I have paid in full approximately {$11000.00} in unauthorized charges on previous card accounts that were replaced by my current card ending in XXXX. These charges were made without my knowledge or authorization. Throughout my ongoing communication with Citi, I have provided supporting documentation, including paid gambling markers stamped Paid in Full by XXXX XXXX. 
However, it has come to my attentionbased on conversations with XXXX, Fraud Department Manager at Citithat these markers were submitted under my previous card numbers. As a result, the documentation was not properly associated with the disputed charges on my current account. This administrative oversight has unfortunately delayed the resolution of my dispute and contributed to the continued reinstatement of these unauthorized amounts. 
The current reporting of these charges as outstanding is inaccurate and constitutes a violation of the Fair Credit Reporting Act ( FCRA ), which mandates that furnishers provide only accurate and verifiable information to credit bureaus. 
I respectfully request the following actions be taken immediately : XXXX Remove the inaccurate negative information reported to the credit bureaus regarding the over-limit status and high balance. 
XXXX Correct the reported balance to accurately reflect the payments made and the resolution of the disputed charges. 
XXXX Cease any further negative reporting related to these unauthorized and already-paid charges. 
XXXX Confirm in writing that these corrections have been made and reflected in my credit file. 
I trust Citi will handle this matter with the urgency and integrity it warrants. Please consider this a formal dispute under the FCRA. I request a full investigation and written response within XXXX calendar days from the date of this letter. 
Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter. I am hopeful for a swift and fair resolution. 
Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
